_comment: Contract address registry for HealthChain Stellar contracts. Populated by the deploy script. Read by SorobanService via STELLAR_NETWORK env var.

_env_vars.STELLAR_NETWORK: Network to use: 'testnet' or 'mainnet'. Defaults to 'testnet'.
_env_vars.COORDINATOR_CONTRACT_ID: Override: coordinator contract address (takes precedence over this file).
_env_vars.INVENTORY_CONTRACT_ID: Override: inventory contract address (takes precedence over this file).
_env_vars.PAYMENTS_CONTRACT_ID: Override: payments contract address (takes precedence over this file).
_env_vars.TEMPERATURE_CONTRACT_ID: Override: temperature contract address (takes precedence over this file).
_env_vars.REQUESTS_CONTRACT_ID: Override: requests contract address (takes precedence over this file).
